news_list.title: Media centre's efficiency praised
news_list.summary:
ASIAN BEACH GAMES - BAHRAIN Olympic Committee secretary general and Olympic Council of Asia (OCA) media committee chair Faris Al Kooheji attended yesterday the official inauguration of the main media centre (MMC) at the sixth Asian Beach Games in Sanya, China.

Al Kooheji was on hand alongside a number of other OCA officials.

The MMC was designed to support media professionals from across the continent, and it serves as the central nervous system for the Games, combining a main Press centre, an international broadcast centre, and a media hotel.

Al Kooheji expressed high praise for the facility, noting its "smooth operations" and suggesting that its efficiency sets a new benchmark for future events, including the upcoming Asian Games in Aichi-Nagoya in Japan later this year.

news_list.title: New industrial hub takes shape in Rawang
news_list.summary:
THE industrial landscape of northern Klang Valley has seen a significant boost following the launch of Elmina Business Park 2 in Rawang, Selangor.

This expansion builds on the success of Sime Darby Property Bhd's original Elmina Business Park, addressing the growing demand for prime industrial space within the established Guthrie Corridor.

The project's maiden release, comprising Phases 1A and 1B, offers 19 freehold industrial land lots.

Market response had been notably positive, with an estimated 70% take-up rate, according to a Sime Darby Property media statement.

This highlighted the scarcity of prime industrial parcels in a region known for its robust infrastructure and wellness- centric design, the company said.

Spanning 242.8ha with a total gross development value of RM1.72bil, the park features 72 units of semi-detached factories and industrial lots ranging from 0.8ha to 1.6ha.

Businesses can also take advantage of flexible built-to-suit and built-to-lease options to accommodate diverse operational requirements.

Connectivity is a cornerstone of the development located 2km north of Elmina Business Park.

The site enjoys direct access via the dedicated Lagong interchange on Guthrie Corridor Expressway (GCE), providing seamless links to the North-South Expressway and LATAR Expressway, both situated about 2km from the GCE exit.

It also boasts multi-modal transport links, with Kuang KTM station located within 2km, Subang Airport within 25km and two future ECRL stations at Serendah and Puncak Alam planned within 20km.

Sime Darby Property chief operating officer (township development) Appollo Leong said the project aimed to revolutionise industrial townships by focusing on ecosystems where businesses could prosper.

"With Elmina Business Park 2, we are delivering the same world-class standards and freehold advantage in a strategically located, high-growth corridor.

"The limited units remaining present a timely opportunity for businesses to secure land in a development that supports long-term growth, operational efficiency and workforce well-being," he said.

The 607ha Elmina Business Park remains Klang Valley's largest freehold industrial hub.

It is notably set to house Google's first hyperscale data centre in Malaysia scheduled for completion this year.

The media statement also stated that the new phase integrated business functionality with sustainability, offering a proposed business support centre, staff housing and 44.5ha of parkland for employee rejuvenation.

news_list.title: IEA: Growth in renewable energy slowed carbon emissions in 2025
news_list.summary:
The International Energy Agency (IEA) says global energy-related carbon dioxide emissions rose at a slower pace in 2025, as rapid expansion in solar power helped offset increase in advanced economies.

In its Global Energy Review published on Monday, the agency said emissions rose by 0.4 percent in 2025 -- a slowdown compared to recent years -- driven largely by a surge in solar photovoltaic (PV) supply.

The IEA said global energy demand growth also eased to 1.3 percent in 2025, slightly below the previous decade's average, amid weaker economic growth, milder temperatures in some regions, and improved energy efficiency.

However, electricity consumption continued to rise strongly, increasing by about 3 percent, which was more than double the pace of overall energy demand growth.

The report noted that solar PV was "the single largest contributor" to global energy supply growth for the first time, accounting for more than 25 percent of the increase.

"Natural gas took the next largest share, at 17%, reflecting its role in power generation in many countries," the report said.

"Overall, renewable sources and nuclear met nearly 60% of all growth in energy demand - and power generation from these sources exceeded total growth in electricity demand."

Fatih Birol, IEA executive director, said electricity consumption is growing much faster than overall energy demand.

"Global energy demand continued to increase in 2025 against a complex economic and geopolitical backdrop, with one trend unmistakable: the expanding electrification of economies," Birol said.

"Solar PV accounted for over a quarter of all of the world's energy demand growth - more than any other source, for the first time - followed right after by natural gas. In today's rapidly shifting landscape, countries that prioritise resilience and diversification will be best placed to manage volatility and deliver secure and affordable energy in the years ahead."

ADVANCED ECONOMIES DRIVE EMISSIONS RISE

Despite the growth of renewables, the IEA said emissions in advanced economies rose by 0.5 percent -- outpacing the 0.3 percent increase recorded in emerging and developing economies for the first time since the 1990s.

The agency attributed the increase largely to higher fossil fuel use during colder weather, particularly in the United States, where elevated gas prices led to increased reliance on coal-fired power.

"Energy demand growth in the United States rose to its second-highest level this century - excluding post-recession recovery years - boosted by strong electricity demand from data centres, robust industrial activity and also colder winter temperatures," IEA said.

By contrast, the agency said China recorded a decline in emissions in 2025, supported by a surge in renewable energy deployment and efficiency gains.

India's emissions remained flat for the first time since the 1970s outside pandemic conditions, aided by a strong monsoon season and increased clean energy generation.

"In the electricity sector, the additional 600 terawatt-hours of solar PV generation worldwide in 2025 marked the largest structural increase ever recorded in a single year for any electricity generation technology, contributing to a decline in coal-fired electricity generation globally," the report said.

"Battery storage was the fastest-growing power sector technology in 2025.

"The roughly 110 gigawatts of new battery storage capacity added during the year exceeded the largest-ever annual capacity additions for natural gas.

"Meanwhile over 12 gigawatts of nuclear power reactors began construction in 2025, amid renewed momentum for nuclear projects in several regions."

The IEA added that cumulative deployment of low-emission technologies since 2019 now avoids fossil fuel consumption equivalent to the entire energy demand of Latin America annually.

It said countries that prioritise energy diversification and resilience would be better positioned to manage volatility and ensure long-term energy security.

news_list.title: Oracle incentives spark debate over jobs and AI
news_list.summary:
A growing debate over artificial intelligence, layoffs, and immigration policy has taken a sharper turn after scrutiny of incentives tied to Oracle Corporation's Nashville expansion. Tennessee taxpayers committed roughly $240 million to attract the company's headquarters, but reports suggest the net job creation has been far lower than expected. The situation has intensified concerns about how public funds intersect with corporate hiring strategies in an AI-driven economy.

Artificial intelligence continues to transform hiring needs across the tech sector. Companies are investing heavily in automation tools that can perform coding, analytics, and support functions with minimal human input. This reduces the need for large teams, particularly in entry-level roles. As firms like Oracle Corporation expand infrastructure and AI capabilities, workforce growth no longer scales in the same way it once did.

Recent layoffs across the industry reflect a broader shift toward efficiency. Companies are cutting overlapping roles, slowing hiring, and prioritizing high-impact positions. While economic pressures and post-pandemic corrections play a role, automation is increasingly central to these decisions. The Nashville case highlights a disconnect between traditional job-creation expectations and modern corporate strategies focused on leaner operations.

READ: Social media speculates Oracle layoffs may be linked to H-1B hiring trends (April 14, 2026)

The H-1B visa program remains a key factor in workforce planning. Supporters argue it enables companies to access specialized talent critical for AI development. Critics, however, question whether reliance on global talent reduces opportunities for domestic workers, especially when combined with automation. The debate has become more pointed as job creation tied to public incentives comes under scrutiny.

Workers in routine or easily automated roles face the greatest uncertainty. Junior developers, administrative staff, and support roles are increasingly vulnerable as AI systems take over repetitive tasks. Meanwhile, demand remains strong for highly skilled professionals in AI, cloud computing, and advanced engineering.

READ: Oracle layoffs raise questions as over 3,100 H-1B visa petitions filed bv (April 4, 2026)

The gap between corporate investment and job creation is likely to widen as AI adoption accelerates. Policymakers may face pressure to rethink how incentives are structured, with greater emphasis on measurable employment outcomes. At the same time, workers will need to adapt by developing skills aligned with emerging technologies.

The Nashville example underscores a broader shift in the global tech economy. The United States could gain from increased productivity and innovation, while countries like India may continue to supply highly skilled talent that supports AI development. Both countries stand to benefit from collaboration, but only if policies evolve to ensure that economic gains translate into meaningful employment opportunities.

themes.name: AI 發展與企業佈局引發的就業與移民政策辯論
themes.insight: Oracle 在納許維爾的擴張計畫與相關激勵措施引發了關於人工智慧（AI）、裁員和移民政策的激烈辯論。納許維爾的案例凸顯了公共資金如何與企業在 AI 驅動經濟中的招聘策略相互作用，以及企業對自動化和效率的投資如何影響傳統的就業創造預期。H-1B 簽證計畫在此背景下受到質疑，引發了對國內工人機會的擔憂。
evidence: A growing debate over artificial intelligence, layoffs, and immigration policy has taken a sharper turn after scrutiny of incentives tied to Oracle Corporation's Nashville expansion.
Tennessee taxpayers committed roughly $240 million to attract the company's headquarters, but reports suggest the net job creation has been far lower than expected.
Artificial intelligence continues to transform hiring needs across the tech sector.
The H-1B visa program remains a key factor in workforce planning.
The Nashville example underscores a broader shift in the global tech economy.

themes.name: 全球能源轉型與碳排放趨勢
themes.insight: 國際能源署 (IEA) 報告指出，2025 年全球能源相關二氧化碳排放增長放緩，主要受太陽能發電快速擴張的推動。儘管如此，已開發經濟體的排放量有所上升，部分原因在於能源效率改善和更嚴寒的天氣導致化石燃料使用增加。報告同時強調了電力消費的強勁增長以及電池儲能和核能的發展。
evidence: The International Energy Agency (IEA) says global energy-related carbon dioxide emissions rose at a slower pace in 2025, as rapid expansion in solar power helped offset increase in advanced economies.
However, electricity consumption continued to rise strongly, increasing by about 3 percent, which was more than double the pace of overall energy demand growth.
The IEA said emissions rose by 0.4 percent in 2025 -- a slowdown compared to recent years -- driven largely by a surge in solar photovoltaic (PV) supply.
ADVANCED ECONOMIES DRIVE EMISSIONS RISE
Battery storage was the fastest-growing power sector technology in 2025.

themes.name: 東南亞與馬來西亞工業發展新動態
themes.insight: 馬來西亞北部的巴生谷地區迎來新的工業發展動力，Elmina Business Park 2 在 Rawang 啟動。該園區提供優越的基礎設施和戰略性地理位置，並吸引了如 Google 的超級數據中心入駐，顯示該區域在吸引大型科技投資和發展高端工業園區方面的潛力。市場對此類優質工業地塊的需求強勁。
evidence: THE industrial landscape of northern Klang Valley has seen a significant boost following the launch of Elmina Business Park 2 in Rawang, Selangor.
The project's maiden release, comprising Phases 1A and 1B, offers 19 freehold industrial land lots.
Market response had been notably positive, with an estimated 70% take-up rate, according to a Sime Darby Property media statement.
The 607ha Elmina Business Park remains Klang Valley's largest freehold industrial hub.
It is notably set to house Google's first hyperscale data centre in Malaysia scheduled for completion this year.

themes.name: 基金市場動態：多重資產、特定區域與產業基金受關注
themes.insight: 市場上有多檔基金產品受到關注，包括群益旗下多檔多重資產、地產入息、印度中小、特別股及金融債券基金。這反映了投資者對多元資產配置、特定區域（如印度）及特定資產類別的興趣。此外，其他如富蘭克林理柏台股基金、台中銀數位時代基金等月報的發布，也顯示了對不同類型基金市場表現的關注。

tech_topic_heatmap.benchmark: 科技主題 / 新聞主線
tech_topic_heatmap.summary: 科技主題熱度集中在 AI 發展與企業佈局引發的就業與移民政策辯論、全球能源轉型與碳排放趨勢、東南亞與馬來西亞工業發展新動態，主線仍由新聞主題驅動。

topics.topic: AI 發展與企業佈局引發的就業與移民政策辯論
topics.summary: Oracle 在納許維爾的擴張計畫與相關激勵措施引發了關於人工智慧（AI）、裁員和移民政策的激烈辯論。納許維爾的案例凸顯了公共資金如何與企業在 AI 驅動經濟中的招聘策略相互作用，以及企業對自動化和效率的投資如何影響傳統的就業創造預期。H-1B 簽證計畫在此背景下受到質疑，引發了對國內工人機會的擔憂。
evidence: A growing debate over artificial intelligence, layoffs, and immigration policy has taken a sharper turn after scrutiny of incentives tied to Oracle Corporation's Nashville expansion.
Tennessee taxpayers committed roughly $240 million to attract the company's headquarters, but reports suggest the net job creation has been far lower than expected.
Artificial intelligence continues to transform hiring needs across the tech sector.
The H-1B visa program remains a key factor in workforce planning.
The Nashville example underscores a broader shift in the global tech economy.

topics.topic: 全球能源轉型與碳排放趨勢
topics.summary: 國際能源署 (IEA) 報告指出，2025 年全球能源相關二氧化碳排放增長放緩，主要受太陽能發電快速擴張的推動。儘管如此，已開發經濟體的排放量有所上升，部分原因在於能源效率改善和更嚴寒的天氣導致化石燃料使用增加。報告同時強調了電力消費的強勁增長以及電池儲能和核能的發展。
evidence: The International Energy Agency (IEA) says global energy-related carbon dioxide emissions rose at a slower pace in 2025, as rapid expansion in solar power helped offset increase in advanced economies.
However, electricity consumption continued to rise strongly, increasing by about 3 percent, which was more than double the pace of overall energy demand growth.
The IEA said emissions rose by 0.4 percent in 2025 -- a slowdown compared to recent years -- driven largely by a surge in solar photovoltaic (PV) supply.
ADVANCED ECONOMIES DRIVE EMISSIONS RISE
Battery storage was the fastest-growing power sector technology in 2025.

topics.topic: 東南亞與馬來西亞工業發展新動態
topics.summary: 馬來西亞北部的巴生谷地區迎來新的工業發展動力，Elmina Business Park 2 在 Rawang 啟動。該園區提供優越的基礎設施和戰略性地理位置，並吸引了如 Google 的超級數據中心入駐，顯示該區域在吸引大型科技投資和發展高端工業園區方面的潛力。市場對此類優質工業地塊的需求強勁。
evidence: THE industrial landscape of northern Klang Valley has seen a significant boost following the launch of Elmina Business Park 2 in Rawang, Selangor.
The project's maiden release, comprising Phases 1A and 1B, offers 19 freehold industrial land lots.
Market response had been notably positive, with an estimated 70% take-up rate, according to a Sime Darby Property media statement.
The 607ha Elmina Business Park remains Klang Valley's largest freehold industrial hub.
It is notably set to house Google's first hyperscale data centre in Malaysia scheduled for completion this year.

topics.topic: 基金市場動態：多重資產、特定區域與產業基金受關注
topics.summary: 市場上有多檔基金產品受到關注，包括群益旗下多檔多重資產、地產入息、印度中小、特別股及金融債券基金。這反映了投資者對多元資產配置、特定區域（如印度）及特定資產類別的興趣。此外，其他如富蘭克林理柏台股基金、台中銀數位時代基金等月報的發布，也顯示了對不同類型基金市場表現的關注。
evidence: 1.群益印美戰略多重資產基金三月...
2.群益全球地產入息基金三月市場...
3.群益中小型股基金三月市場綜合...
4.全球投資專家富蘭克林 理柏台...
5.台中銀數位時代基金三月份市場...
2.群益印度中小基金三月市場綜合評論

ai_analysis.full_text:
2026-04-22 盤前晨報：高溢價下的盤勢變數
【今日結論】
今日台股開盤將聚焦於台積電 ADR 13.24% 的高溢價是否能順利消化。若溢價擴大引發修正，則整體盤勢恐將承壓，操作上需謹慎。反之，若台積電ADR的高價位能獲得承接，市場則可留意 CPO 及測試載板等相關題材的表現。
【新聞驅動】
地緣政治緊張情緒因伊朗拒絕出席第二輪談判再度升溫，加上川普的消息面雜訊，導致美股早盤漲幅回吐，終場三大指數同步收黑。亞馬遜進軍 GLP-1 減重管理服務，對生技及遠距醫療業者構成潛在衝擊。此外，英特爾受惠於 CPU 需求強勁，ADR 表現亮眼。市場對於蘋果 CEO 庫克卸任的討論，也聚焦在其任內的亮眼成績與未來創新挑戰。
【國際與台股】
昨夜美股三大指數下跌，S&P 500 跌 0.63%，Nasdaq 跌 0.59%，僅費半逆勢上漲 0.50%。台積電 ADR 上漲 0.50%，然而換算後與台灣現貨價 2,050 元相比，高達 13.24% 的溢價幅度是今日台股開盤的重要觀察指標。雖然 CNN 恐懼貪婪指數顯示「貪婪」，但加密貨幣市場卻是「恐懼」，顯示資金情緒分歧。東北亞的日經 225 和 KOSPI 市場皆以上漲開盤，為台股提供一定支撐。
【KOL與情緒】
社群熱搜關鍵字如「法國電力公司」、「聯茂」、「cpo 概念股」、「華城電機股份有限公司」、「金居違約交割」、「0056配息」等，顯現散戶情緒正轉向特定族群和個股，特別是「金居違約交割」這類負面消息的出現，疊加外資期貨連日淨空，暗示市場可能存在不確定性或個別公司風險，增加盤面噪音。
【操作含意】
今日操作應優先關注台積電 ADR 高溢價的消化情況。若盤中出現明顯修正，投資人應降低部位，尋找避險標的。若台積電能穩住陣腳，則可伺機切入 CPO 及測試相關族群，並留意盤面結構性輪動的機會。同時，需密切關注新增非農就業數據低於預期所帶來的宏觀經濟風險，警惕經濟下行潛在影響。

selected_charts.title: 市場情緒
selected_charts.description: CNN 恐懼貪婪、加密貨幣情緒、台灣市場情緒與廣度。
selected_charts.takeaway: 台灣市場情緒目前處於「貪婪」區間 (67)，顯示投資者普遍樂觀。然而，需留意市場廣度數據 (上漲家數 556，下跌家數 425)，判斷上漲動能是否能擴散。
selected_charts.action: 關注市場情緒與資金流向是否能支撐盤勢。

selected_charts.title: 科技主題熱度圖
selected_charts.description: 科技新聞主題與市場主線的熱度排名與來源證據。
selected_charts.takeaway: 科技新聞主題中，「AI 發展與企業佈局引發的就業與移民政策辯論」以 85 的分數位居熱度首位，顯示 AI 發展與相關政策的持續影響力。
selected_charts.action: 關注 AI 相關技術與政策發展對產業的潛在影響。

selected_charts.title: 社群熱度圖
selected_charts.description: PTT / Dcard / Google Trends 的熱門主題、速度與升溫強度。
selected_charts.takeaway: 社群熱度聚焦在法國電力公司、CPO 概念股、華城電機股份有限公司等，共有 6 個上升主題，顯示市場資金對特定題材的關注度。
selected_charts.action: 留意社群關注的題材是否能帶動盤面輪動。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 台灣市場情緒目前處於「貪婪」區間 (67)，顯示投資者普遍樂觀。然而，需留意市場廣度數據 (上漲家數 556，下跌家數 425)，判斷上漲動能是否能擴散。
chart_commentary.action: 關注市場情緒與資金流向是否能支撐盤勢。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 科技新聞主題中，「AI 發展與企業佈局引發的就業與移民政策辯論」以 85 的分數位居熱度首位，顯示 AI 發展與相關政策的持續影響力。
chart_commentary.action: 關注 AI 相關技術與政策發展對產業的潛在影響。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 社群熱度聚焦在法國電力公司、CPO 概念股、華城電機股份有限公司等，共有 6 個上升主題，顯示市場資金對特定題材的關注度。
chart_commentary.action: 留意社群關注的題材是否能帶動盤面輪動。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 今日台股開盤將聚焦於台積電 ADR 13.24% 的高溢價是否能順利消化。在地緣政治緊張情緒及川普消息面雜訊影響下，美股早盤漲幅回吐，終場三大指數同步收黑。盤勢關鍵在於台積電 ADR 的表態，若能穩住，CPO 及測試載板等相關題材可望有所表現。社群與科技新聞熱度集中在 AI 相關辯論、能源轉型及東南亞工業發展。台灣市場情緒顯示投資者偏向樂觀，然需關注市場廣度以判斷漲勢能否持續。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 把衝突事件數、致死數與未來風險預測可視化，讓地緣政治對市場的影響更直觀。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 專案已有 ACLED service，但目前未做成可視化圖表。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 把 PTT 與 Dcard 的熱門討論、看多看空比與主題熱度做成圖，補足市場情緒面。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 現有 trend_pulse 與社群抓取已能提供底層資料。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 晨報常聚焦 AI / 半導體 / 科技權值，將科技主題與新聞來源拆開呈現會更清楚。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 目前科技內容散落在新聞主題與 AI 分析中，尚未獨立成圖。

headline.teaser: **2026-04-22 盤前晨報：高溢價下的盤勢變數**
